'''âsh-w-n''' ('''kashawan''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yoick|yoick]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| sh-w-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yoick|yoick]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âsh-w-n
|-
! Lemma
| kashawan
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thishawan|thishawan]] || [[word:jishawan|jishawan]] || [[word:shishawan|shishawan]] || [[word:kishawan|kishawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthushawan|thuthushawan]] || [[word:jujushawan|jujushawan]] || [[word:shushushawan|shushushawan]] || [[word:kukushawan|kukushawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thushawan|thushawan]] || [[word:jushawan|jushawan]] || [[word:shushawan|shushawan]] || [[word:kushawan|kushawan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thushawan|thushawan]] || [[word:jushawan|jushawan]] || [[word:shushawan|shushawan]] || [[word:kushawan|kushawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:theshawan|theshawan]] || [[word:jeshawan|jeshawan]] || [[word:sheshawan|sheshawan]] || [[word:keshawan|keshawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothoshawan|thothoshawan]] || [[word:jojoshawan|jojoshawan]] || [[word:shoshoshawan|shoshoshawan]] || [[word:kokoshawan|kokoshawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thoshawan|thoshawan]] || [[word:joshawan|joshawan]] || [[word:shoshawan|shoshawan]] || [[word:koshawan|koshawan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thoshawan|thoshawan]] || [[word:joshawan|joshawan]] || [[word:shoshawan|shoshawan]] || [[word:koshawan|koshawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠshawan|thĂŠshawan]] || [[word:jĂŠshawan|jĂŠshawan]] || [[word:shĂŠshawan|shĂŠshawan]] || [[word:kĂŠshawan|kĂŠshawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathashawan|thathashawan]] || [[word:jajashawan|jajashawan]] || [[word:shashashawan|shashashawan]] || [[word:kakashawan|kakashawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thashawan|thashawan]] || [[word:jashawan|jashawan]] || [[word:shashawan|shashawan]] || [[word:kashawan|kashawan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thashawan|thashawan]] || [[word:jashawan|jashawan]] || [[word:shashawan|shashawan]] || [[word:kashawan|kashawan]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shashawan|shashawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshashawan|goshashawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishashawan|gokishashawan]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shashawanĂŒ|shashawanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshashawanknĂŒ|goshashawanknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishashawanĂŒ|gokishashawanĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shashawanshĂ«|shashawanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshashawankshĂ«|goshashawankshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishashawanshĂ«|gokishashawanshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashawanro|shashawanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashawankro|goshashawankro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashawanro|gokishashawanro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shashawanmu|shashawanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashawankmu|goshashawankmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashawanmu|gokishashawanmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shashawansher|shashawansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshashawanksher|goshashawanksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishashawansher|gokishashawansher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shashawang|shashawang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshashawankng|goshashawankng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishashawang|gokishashawang]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shashawanya|shashawanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshashawankya|goshashawankya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishashawanya|gokishashawanya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shashawanyam|shashawanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshashawankyam|goshashawankyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishashawanyam|gokishashawanyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashawanĂŒshĂ«|shashawanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashawanknĂŒshĂ«|goshashawanknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashawanĂŒshĂ«|gokishashawanĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashawanĂŒro|shashawanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashawanknĂŒro|goshashawanknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashawanĂŒro|gokishashawanĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashawanĂŒmu|shashawanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashawanknĂŒmu|goshashawanknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashawanĂŒmu|gokishashawanĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashawanshĂ«nĂŒ|shashawanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashawankshĂ«nĂŒ|goshashawankshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashawanshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishashawanshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashawanshĂ«ro|shashawanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashawankshĂ«ro|goshashawankshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashawanshĂ«ro|gokishashawanshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashawanshĂ«mu|shashawanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashawankshĂ«mu|goshashawankshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashawanshĂ«mu|gokishashawanshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashawanronĂŒ|shashawanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashawankronĂŒ|goshashawankronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashawanronĂŒ|gokishashawanronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashawanroshĂ«|shashawanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashawankroshĂ«|goshashawankroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashawanroshĂ«|gokishashawanroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shashawanromu|shashawanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshashawankromu|goshashawankromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishashawanromu|gokishashawanromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shashawanmunĂŒ|shashawanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshashawankmunĂŒ|goshashawankmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishashawanmunĂŒ|gokishashawanmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shashawanmushĂ«|shashawanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshashawankmushĂ«|goshashawankmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishashawanmushĂ«|gokishashawanmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shashawanmuro|shashawanmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshashawankmuro|goshashawankmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishashawanmuro|gokishashawanmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|dcef9d8}}
